expectations.text: Warns the user that the plan status is 'rejected'
expectations.evidence: Response says 'Warning: The plan plans/old-api-redesign.md has status rejected'

expectations.text: Asks for confirmation before proceeding with the load
expectations.evidence: Response asks 'Are you sure you want to load this rejected plan into plan mode?'

expectations.text: If proceeding, strips YAML front matter and adds metadata comment
expectations.evidence: Plan mode content file shows stripped front matter and metadata comment ready to write on confirmation
